company.name: Al Rimal Al Safra Technical Services L.L.C.

seo.title: ARAS - Design Your Dreams | Engineering & Construction Services
seo.description: ARAS offers Civil, Structural, Architectural, MEP, Electrical, Plumbing, HVAC, and interior fit-out services in Dubai.

hero.tagline: Yesterday is but today's memory, and tomorrow is today's dream.
hero.subtitle: Share your dreams, we will make a better tomorrows.

services.title: BBS & Shop Drawings
services.desc: Preparation of BBS and Shop Drawings submissions with precision and accuracy.

services.title: Architectural Designs
services.desc: Preparation of Architectural Designs and Submissions tailored to your vision.

services.title: Plumbing Services
services.desc: Blocks, leaks, faulty hoses, any problems in your water pipes can be handled by our expert team.

services.title: AC Services
services.desc: AC repairs, coil cleaning, duct cleaning, system health check, and more.

services.title: Electrical Services
services.desc: Electrical installations and repairs by certified professionals.

services.title: Carpentry & Masonry
services.desc: Furniture assembly and general carpentry with meticulous attention to detail.

services.title: Painting Services
services.desc: Interior & exterior, small touch-ups and large-scale restorations.

services.title: Cleaning Services
services.desc: Deep cleaning of occupied and unoccupied residences and commercial units.

services.title: Flooring & Wall Tiling
services.desc: Installing new tiles, re-grouting, marble installation with buffing and polishing.

services.title: Pest Control
services.desc: Removal of existing pests like rodents, cockroaches, and so on.

services.title: Aluminum & Glass Works
services.desc: Aluminum/Glass Doors, Windows, Partitions, and custom fabrications.

services.title: Gypsum False Ceiling
services.desc: Installations of gypsum false ceilings, reparations, and paintings.

services.title: Security & Access Control
services.desc: Installations, locks, and various security measures for peace of mind.

services.title: Screed / Power Float
services.desc: Pouring Concrete/Levelling with Masons and finish by Power Float.
